parityMeta.describes: iOS-17e-4 setWeightFineTuneEngine parity — the sparse-history fallbacks. Two in-window push-a/bench-press sessions give only 2 samples (< MIN_SAMPLES 3), so buildSetWeightFineTune returns the most-recent working weight rounded to plate, samplesUsed 2, currentE1rmKg = the last sample's e1RM, projectedE1rmKg null, fallbackReason 'insufficient_history'. A non-matching-exercise probe pins the 0-sample variant (suggestedWeightKg 0, currentE1rmKg null). A targetReps-clamp probe pins clamp(targetReps, repMin, repMax). FUNCTION-LEVEL compute-assert on the Swift side.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: 2 samples => < MIN_SAMPLES => sparse branch: last inserted = insufficient-s2 (62.5kg). 0-sample probe via unmatched exerciseId.
